language.title: Choose Language
language.subtitle: Please select your preferred language to continue.

step1.title: Welcome!
step1.subtitle: Let's get to know you better to personalize your reminders.

step2.title: Health Profile
step2.subtitle: Select any existing health conditions so we can better tailor your experience.

step3.title: Caregiver Details
step3.subtitle: Please provide the details of your primary caregiver who helps manage your medications.
step3.encouragement: Providing a caregiver ensures someone you trust is notified if you miss a critical dose.

step4.title: Preferences
step4.subtitle: Customize how you want to be reminded about your medications.
